title: Fix WhisperLiveKit startup failure by removing --diarization
description: WhisperLiveKit fails to start in start.sh because --diarization requires nemo_toolkit[asr]. Removed the flag to allow the server to start properly.

title: Add transcription progress bar to CLI
description: Added a rich progress bar to the CLI that tracks transcription progress by using ffprobe to get audio duration and tailing wlk.log for the 'last_end' timestamp.

title: Add back diarization and NeMo dependency
description: Add --diarization flag back to WhisperLiveKit and install the required nemo_toolkit dependency

title: Design initial schema for transcriptions, corrections, and diffs
description: Create SQLModel schema representing transcriptions, corrections, and diffs
